Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Million Hearts® CVD Risk Reduction Model Medicare Data Files Codebook │ May 2025 │ V 1.1 15 

CODE 

LABEL: Code Used to Document the Service 

DESCRIPTION: Code used to document the service. The ACC/AHA risk calculation used clinical information submitted 
by the practice to ascertain CVD risk. The risk factors are documented for each patient. There is one 
record in the file for each patient and each risk factor that was assessed on a
